title: fglpkg manifest
description: Schema for fglpkg.json — the package manifest used by the fglpkg CLI and registry.

$schema.description: Optional schema reference so editors can provide autocomplete and validation.

type.description: Deprecated, accepted-but-ignored. Older manifests set this to "webcomponent" to flag a pure-WC package; the kind is now derived from the presence of `webcomponents` and BDL fields. Safe to omit on new manifests.

name.description: Package name. Must be unique within a registry; conventionally lowercase with no spaces.

version.description: Package version in semver form (MAJOR.MINOR.PATCH, optionally with -prerelease).

description.description: One-line summary shown by `fglpkg search` and `fglpkg info`.

license.description: SPDX license identifier (e.g. MIT, Apache-2.0) or a custom string.

repository.description: URL of the source repository (e.g. https://github.com/org/repo).

keywords.description: Free-form tags that aid registry search and discovery (e.g. ["database", "utilities"]).

main.description: Primary .42m entry point for this package.

visibility.description: Who can see this package on the registry. Defaults to public. Set when the package is first created; ignored on subsequent publishes.

genero.description: Semver constraint for Genero BDL runtime compatibility (e.g. "^6.0.0", ">=4.01 <7"). Omit or use "*" to indicate any Genero version.

root.description: Base directory for package files, relative to this manifest. Defaults to ".".

importRoot.description: Directory whose contents become the archive root. Packaged files under it are stored relative to it (e.g. lib/com/fourjs/x/M.42m -> com/fourjs/x/M.42m), so the package namespace sits at the FGLLDPATH root after install. importRoot and root must lie on the same path (one contains the other, e.g. root "." with importRoot "lib"); defaults to "." (no rebasing).

files.description: Glob patterns of files to include in the published zip. Defaults to ["*.42m", "*.42f", "*.sch"] when omitted.

include.description: Extra project files folded into the archive root (top of importRoot), each stored under its basename.

bin.description: Command-line scripts shipped with the package. Keys are command names; values are paths to executable scripts relative to the package root.

docs.description: Glob patterns of documentation files to include in the published zip (e.g. ["README.md", "docs/**/*.md"]).

programs.description: Module names (without .42m) that declare MAIN blocks and can be launched via `fglpkg bdl`.

webcomponents.description: COMPONENTTYPE names this package provides. A package may declare webcomponents alongside BDL files to ship a BDL wrapper paired with its companion webcomponent. Each name must match the Genero COMPONENTTYPE lexical rule and correspond to a webcomponents/<NAME>/ source directory.

hooks.description: Declarative lifecycle steps. Each event (preinstall/postinstall/prepublish/postpublish/preuninstall) maps to an ordered list of operations from a fixed vocabulary; arbitrary shell commands are not supported.

dependencies.description: Production dependencies — required at runtime by consumers of this package. Keys must be "fgl" or "java".

devDependencies.description: Development-only dependencies for the root project (test harnesses, linters, etc.). Never pulled in transitively when another project depends on this package.

optionalDependencies.description: Dependencies that are attempted like production deps but whose failure to resolve or download only emits a warning.

fgl.description: BDL package dependencies. Keys are package names; values are semver constraint strings (e.g. "^1.2.0", ">=1.0.0 <2.0.0").

java.description: Java JAR dependencies, resolved from Maven Central unless "url" overrides it.

op.description: Operation to perform. The vocabulary is closed; unknown ops are rejected at load time.

from.description: Source path or glob for copy-files. Relative to the hook's working directory; absolute paths and ".." traversal are rejected.

to.description: Destination path for copy-files. Same path constraints as "from".

path.description: Target path for mkdir. Same path constraints as "from"/"to".

version.description: Exact Maven version, e.g. "1.2.3". Ranges are not supported for Java deps.

checksum.description: Optional SHA256 hex digest of the JAR. When present, the downloaded JAR is verified. When absent, Maven Central is trusted without integrity checks.

jar.description: Override the computed JAR filename. Defaults to "<artifactId>-<version>.jar".

url.description: Override the Maven Central URL entirely. Useful for mirrors or non-standard repositories.
